title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a PROGRAMME
gherkin:
When the user creates a "PROGRAMME" "Top Gear" with the following data
  | key  | value    |
  | name | Top Gear |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key                          | value    |
  | name                         | Top Gear |
  | aired_from_year              |          |
  | aired_until_year             |          |
  | channel                      |          |
  | total_seasons                |          |
  | total_episodes               |          |
  | regular_episode_running_time |          |
  | country_code                 |          |
